mapper.select: SELECT bp.brd_pst_idx AS idx, bp.brd_pst_uuid AS uuid, bp.brd_ctgr_idx, bc.brd_ctgr_uuid, bp.mbr_acct_idx, bc.nm AS ctgr_nm, bp.ttl, bp.cntnt, bp.view_cnt, mp.nick_nm AS athr_nick_nm, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_fav f WHERE f.trgt_type = 'BOARD_POST' AND f.trgt_idx = bp.brd_pst_idx ) AS fav_cnt, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_brd_cmt c WHERE c.brd_pst_idx = bp.brd_pst_idx AND c.del_at IS NULL ) AS cmt_cnt, bp.created_by, bp.updated_by, bp.created_at, bp.updated_at FROM tb_brd_pst bp LEFT JOIN tb_brd_ctgr bc ON bc.brd_ctgr_idx = bp.brd_ctgr_idx LEFT JOIN tb_mbr_prfl mp ON mp.mbr_acct_idx = bp.mbr_acct_idx WHERE bp.brd_pst_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND bp.del_at IS NULL

SELECT bp.brd_pst_idx AS idx, bp.brd_pst_uuid AS uuid, bp.brd_ctgr_idx, bc.brd_ctgr_uuid, bp.mbr_acct_idx, bc.nm AS ctgr_nm, bp.ttl, bp.cntnt, bp.view_cnt, mp.nick_nm AS athr_nick_nm, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_fav f WHERE f.trgt_type = 'BOARD_POST' AND f.trgt_idx = bp.brd_pst_idx ) AS fav_cnt, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_brd_cmt c WHERE c.brd_pst_idx = bp.brd_pst_idx AND c.del_at IS NULL ) AS cmt_cnt, bp.created_by, bp.updated_by, bp.created_at, bp.updated_at FROM tb_brd_pst bp LEFT JOIN tb_brd_ctgr bc ON bc.brd_ctgr_idx = bp.brd_ctgr_idx LEFT JOIN tb_mbr_prfl mp ON mp.mbr_acct_idx = bp.mbr_acct_idx WHERE bp.brd_pst_idx = #{idx} AND bp.del_at IS NULL

SELECT bp.brd_pst_uuid AS uuid, bc.nm AS ctgr_nm, bp.ttl, bp.view_cnt, mp.nick_nm AS athr_nick_nm, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_fav f WHERE f.trgt_type = 'BOARD_POST' AND f.trgt_idx = bp.brd_pst_idx ) AS fav_cnt, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_brd_cmt c WHERE c.brd_pst_idx = bp.brd_pst_idx AND c.del_at IS NULL ) AS cmt_cnt, bp.created_at FROM tb_brd_pst bp LEFT JOIN tb_brd_ctgr bc ON bc.brd_ctgr_idx = bp.brd_ctgr_idx LEFT JOIN tb_mbr_prfl mp ON mp.mbr_acct_idx = bp.mbr_acct_idx WHERE bp.del_at IS NULL
AND bc.brd_ctgr_uuid = CAST(#{req.ctgrUuid} AS UUID)
AND bp.cntnt LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.kwd}, '%')
AND mp.nick_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.kwd}, '%')
AND ( bp.ttl LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.kwd}, '%') OR bp.cntnt LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.kwd}, '%') OR mp.nick_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.kwd}, '%') )
AND bp.ttl LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.kwd}, '%')
ORDER BY ${req.orderByClause} LIMIT #{req.size} OFFSET #{req.offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_brd_pst bp LEFT JOIN tb_brd_ctgr bc ON bc.brd_ctgr_idx = bp.brd_ctgr_idx WHERE bp.del_at IS NULL
AND bc.brd_ctgr_uuid = CAST(#{req.ctgrUuid} AS UUID)
AND bp.cntnt LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.kwd}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_mbr_prfl mp WHERE mp.mbr_acct_idx = bp.mbr_acct_idx AND mp.nick_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.kwd}, '%') )
AND ( bp.ttl LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.kwd}, '%') OR bp.cntnt LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.kwd}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_mbr_prfl mp WHERE mp.mbr_acct_idx = bp.mbr_acct_idx AND mp.nick_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.kwd}, '%') ) )
AND bp.ttl LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.kwd}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_brd_pst ( brd_ctgr_idx, mbr_acct_idx, ttl, cntnt, created_by ) VALUES ( #{brdCtgrIdx}, #{mbrAcctIdx}, #{ttl}, #{cntnt}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_brd_pst SET brd_ctgr_idx = #{brdCtgrIdx}, ttl = #{ttl}, cntnt = #{cntnt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE brd_pst_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_brd_pst SET del_at = now(), updated_at = now() WHERE brd_pst_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_brd_pst SET view_cnt = view_cnt + 1 WHERE brd_pst_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT bpf.brd_pst_file_idx AS idx, bpf.brd_pst_file_uuid AS uuid, bpf.brd_pst_idx, bpf.file_idx, bpf.file_role, bpf.sort_ord, f.file_uuid, f.orgnl_nm, f.file_url, f.mime_type, f.file_size, f.upldr_type, bpf.created_by, bpf.created_at FROM tb_brd_pst_file bpf INNER JOIN tb_file f ON f.file_idx = bpf.file_idx WHERE bpf.brd_pst_idx = #{brdPstIdx} AND bpf.del_at IS NULL AND f.del_at IS NULL ORDER BY bpf.sort_ord ASC, bpf.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_brd_pst_file ( brd_pst_idx, file_idx, file_role, sort_ord, created_by ) VALUES ( #{brdPstIdx}, #{fileIdx}, #{fileRole}, #{sortOrd}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_brd_pst_file SET del_at = now() WHERE brd_pst_idx = #{brdPstIdx} AND del_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT brd_ctgr_idx AS idx, brd_ctgr_uuid AS uuid, nm, sort_ord, created_by, created_at FROM tb_brd_ctgr ORDER BY sort_ord ASC, created_at ASC
SELECT brd_ctgr_idx AS idx, brd_ctgr_uuid AS uuid, nm, sort_ord, created_by, created_at FROM tb_brd_ctgr WHERE brd_ctgr_idx = #{idx}
SELECT brd_ctgr_idx AS idx, brd_ctgr_uuid AS uuid, nm, sort_ord, created_by, created_at FROM tb_brd_ctgr WHERE brd_ctgr_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID)
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_brd_ctgr SET nm = #{nm}, sort_ord = #{sortOrd} WHERE brd_ctgr_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_brd_ctgr WHERE brd_ctgr_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_brd_pst WHERE brd_ctgr_idx = #{brdCtgrIdx} AND del_at IS NULL
